calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jun-16-2006 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-27-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Ray Garwacki, Jr., Esq. for Plaintiff: Alliant Credit Union fka United Airlines Employees Credit Union.
Plaintiff's witness: Narissa Dotson Lindo, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Norbert Kruk aka Norbert D. Kruk aka Norbert Daniel Kruk as follows:
Damages $25,551.74
Prejudgment Interest $1,266.36
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $486.70 for a total of $30,129.80
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2004 Continued To Feb-10-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
